evals.name: seata-technical-transcription
evals.prompt: Fix the voice transcription errors in repo-desktop/workspaces/note-tool/transcription-correct/transcription-sample.md. The domain is about SEATA distributed transactions - key terms include Seata, Spring Cloud Alibaba, Spring Boot, AT mode, TC, TM, RM, XA, TCC, SAGA, two-phase commit, 2PC, global transaction, branch transaction, XID, undo log, global lock, local lock, @GlobalTransactional, @GlobalLock, OpenFeign, Netty, Remoting protocol, read isolation, write isolation, dirty read, read committed, read uncommitted, SELECT FOR UPDATE, tx-service-group, JDBC, MySQL, Oracle, Dameng database, before-image, after-image, feature-dev branch.
evals.expected_output: A corrected markdown file at repo-desktop/workspaces/note-tool/transcription-correct/transcription-sample_corrected.md with voice recognition errors fixed, particularly homophone errors and technical terminology corrections. The file should maintain proper markdown formatting and preserve the original meaning.

evals.name: auto-detect-domain-context
evals.prompt: Correct the voice transcription errors in repo-desktop/workspaces/note-tool/transcription-correct/transcription-sample.md. I don't have specific domain information, but it's a technical lecture.
evals.expected_output: A corrected markdown file at repo-desktop/workspaces/note-tool/transcription-correct/transcription-sample_corrected.md. The skill should auto-detect this is about distributed transactions/SEATA from the content and apply appropriate corrections.

evals.name: specify-correction-rounds
evals.prompt: Fix the transcription in repo-desktop/workspaces/note-tool/transcription-correct/transcription-sample.md with 2 correction rounds. Domain: SEATA distributed transactions framework.
evals.expected_output: A corrected markdown file after exactly 2 correction rounds, with iterative improvements applied.
